Instructions for contributing to the project, including links to detailed documentation.

# Purpose
The `Contributing` file provides guidance on how to contribute to the project. It directs users to the Pallets detailed contributing documentation for information on various contribution methods, such as reporting issues, requesting features, asking or answering questions, and making pull requests. The file includes a hyperlink to the contributing documentation at `https://palletsprojects.com/contributing/`.
